candidates.why: Potential current maturities line, but values are not populated in preview and could include lease obligations; no cleaner non-lease current debt line is visible.

variables.notes: No confident non-lease short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt line identified. Visible current debt-related lines are lease-related and excluded by rule.
No taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable line identified on the balance sheet. Tax-related lines shown are receivables or deferred tax, not TXP.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet line for total tangible fixed assets, best proxy for property, plant and equipment (net).

candidates.row_label: Total tangible fixed assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/subtotal type line, less preferred than the reported tangible fixed assets line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related component only, not total PPE and baseline prefers total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow transaction, not balance sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow transaction, not balance sheet PPE stock.
Intangibles, not PPE.

Intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Direct net operating cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities - Continuing Operations
candidates.why: Semantically relevant, but appears unpopulated in preview; the generic operating cash flow line is cleaner.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.
